title: Strength SMP Mace
description: This mod makes it so the mace behaves like the one from the strength SMP with a cooldown and no enchantments!
body:
This mod adds a cooldown to the Mace like the one from the strength SMP.
The time for the recharging can be changed in the config/mace-cooldown.json
it also makes it so the mace can't be enchanted.
